title: Anomalosicyos macrocarpus
taxonomy: Anomalosicyos macrocarpus is a species of plant that belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and relationships with other plants within the Cucurbitaceae family. The Cucurbitaceae family includes various types of plants commonly known as gourds, melons, and cucumbers. intro: Anomalosicyos macrocarpus, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a type of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae.
